cmd.clear_my_answers: Ka phithawnnak hna hlawh (a thawknak in ṭhan)

cmd.clear_workspace: Zafa hlawh i a thar in ṭhan

cmd.create_lesson: Cawnnak pakhat ser (a kong ka hngalhter)
cmd.create_lesson_done3: caah — AlloBot nih a tang ah lam an hruai lai.
cmd.create_lesson_done_blank: Lamhruai cawnnak luanlam thawk a si — AlloBot nih na kong an hal lai.
cmd.create_lesson_hint: Lamhruai luanlam a thawk — kong le grade chim
cmd.cycle_reading_theme_hint: A lum, sepia, a muih, dyslexia caah a ṭha, le a dangdang luan in zoh
cmd.export_pack_done: Cawnnak pack download timhcia a si…
cmd.export_pack_hint: Cawnnak kha amah lawng aa kapmi file in download
cmd.font_reset_done: Cafang ngandang a hmasa zinglei ah a ṭhan cang.
cmd.font_reset_hint: A hmasa zinglei ngandang ah kir
cmd.generate_analysis_hint: Atu sungh ah catlanghmun philhnak ṭuan
cmd.generate_glossary_hint: Atu sungh in biafang phunglh ser

cmd.generate_quiz_done: Hi sungh in quiz ser a si…
cmd.generate_sentence_frames_done: Biaṭial frame hna ser a si…

cmd.generate_simplified: Hi cafang fawi deuh in ser
cmd.generate_simplified_done: A fawi deuhmi version ser a si…

cmd.launch_flashcards_hint: Hi biafang phunglh hi flashcard deck in cawn
cmd.open_class_session_done: Class session dialog a hung cang.

cmd.open_community_catalog_hint: Aa rakmi community cawnnak hna zoh
cmd.open_document_builder_hint: Aa danglammi cazin hna ser le chuahpiak
cmd.open_educator_hub_done: Educator Hub a hung cang — Document Pipeline card cu a cunglei ah a um.
cmd.open_educator_hub_hint: Cawnnak hmanthlak hna + Document Pipeline card
cmd.open_learning_hub_hint: Lentecelh, hngalhcuah, le cawnnak hmanthlak hna
cmd.open_lumen_done: Lumen cu STEM Lab ah a hung cang.
cmd.open_lumen_hint: Assessment data kha chart ah thlen
cmd.open_notebook_hint: Aa khiahmi cahmai le luhmi hna
cmd.open_persona_chat_hint: Hi kong he aa tlaihmi AI persona biahal
cmd.open_project_settings_hint: Project khat cio AI, biachimnak, le Socratic khennak
cmd.open_stem_lab_hint: Aa pehtlaihmi sayense le pawngsiar hmanthlak hna
cmd.open_submission_inbox_hint: Sianginn nih an pekṭhenmi rian zoh
cmd.open_text_settings_hint: Font, karlak, le aural option hna
cmd.open_voice_settings_hint: Aw, a rang, le a awnah
cmd.open_wizard_hint: Hmun te te in cawnnak sernak
cmd.pipeline_downloads_done: Download zalh — tag a tahmi PDF cu rakṭuanding copy a si.
cmd.pipeline_fix_again: Hmangphung khawhnak remnak ṭhan in ṭuan
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_done: Remnak luan dang ṭuan a si…
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_hint: Score a sang deuhnak caah remnak luan dang
cmd.pipeline_issues_hint: A biapi a tanglei buaibainak hna a chim
cmd.pipeline_issues_more2: a tam deuh cu Issues panel ah a um.
cmd.pipeline_jump_miss: Cu zalh cu tuah caan ah hman ah a um lo.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc: Cazin thar in a thar in thawk
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_done: A cing cang — thawk awkah cazin thar tlohchuah.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_hint: Hi achuak hi hlawh i file thar tlohchuah
cmd.pipeline_score: Ka hmangphung khawhnak score zeidah a si?
cmd.pipeline_score_hint: Atu a hmasa → a hnu a chim
cmd.pipeline_score_none: Remnak ṭuannak pakhat hmanh a hung lo.
cmd.pipeline_stop_done: Atu luan a dih hnu ah a din lai.
cmd.pipeline_stop_hint: Atu luan a dih hnu ah dinter — a tlinmi cu a ṭuan rih
cmd.pipeline_tour: Hi achuak hna hi ka hmuhsak ve
cmd.read_this_page: Hi cahmai hi ka rel piak
cmd.read_this_page_done: Cahmai relhnak a hung cang — zeilai ah thawk timi thim.
cmd.stop_reading_done: Aw in relhnak a dih cang.
cmd.submit_work_hint: Na rian kha na sayapa sin ah thlah
cmd.switch_theme: Theme thlen (a fianglei / a muih / a danghin tukmi)
cmd.switch_theme_done: Theme a thleng cang — a fianglei, a muih, cun a danghin tukmi tiah a luan.
cmd.switch_theme_hint: A fianglei → a muih → a danghin tukmi tiah luan
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_consent: Cloud-sync lungtlinnak dialog hawng a si — onter awkah cuka ah confirm.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_hint: Na rian kha cloud ah sync (a voikhatnak ah lungtlinnak a hal)
cmd.toggle_color_overlay_hint: Cahmai cung ah aural a nem te luan in tah
cmd.toggle_focus_mode_hint: Sungh lawng hlah in a dang zafa muihter
cmd.toggle_help_mode_done: Bawmhnak mode a thleng cang — a kong hngalh awkah control zeihmanh click.
cmd.toggle_help_mode_hint: A kong hngalh awkah zeihmanh click
cmd.toggle_reading_ruler_hint: Zulh awkah a lengmi ṭial lamhruaitu
cmd.translate_document_done2: cun button a langhter — leh awkah Translate hreh. (Lehnak nih AI quota a hman, cucaah click cu nangmah lawng a si rih.)
cmd.translate_document_hint: Holh a chiacia i button kha a kawhsam
cmd.translate_document_pick: Lehnak control hna a langhter — holh thim i Translate hreh.
cmd.undo_settings: Ka settings thlennak hnusabik kha let
cmd.undo_settings_done: Na settings hlui a ṭhanter cang (let awk thlennak a um ahcun).
cmd.undo_settings_hint: Cawnnak settings hlui ṭhanter (a serhmi sungh a si lo)
cmd.voice_start_done: Aw uknak a um. “bigger text” asiloah “open the educator hub” bantukin command chim. Dih awkah “stop listening” chim.
cmd.voice_start_hint: Na dinter hlan tiang AlloBot nih command a ngaihthlak
cmd.voice_stop_done: Aw uknak a dih — microphone a luatter cang.
cmd.zen_on_done: Zen mode a um — kir awkah Ctrl+K hreh i “exit zen” ṭuan.
cmd.zen_on_hint: Sungh lawng hlah in zafa thup
palette.confirm: ⚠ Confirm awkah Enter ṭhan in hreh
palette.footer: Tuahnak zafa kha a theh a si. Ctrl+K nih a thleng.
palette.no_match: Aa tlukmi command a um lo. Bot chat (le a rauthiammi aw) nih a luatmi halnak hna a hngalh.
palette.placeholder: Command ṭial — “bigger text”, “educator hub”, “read this page”…
cmd.set_ui_language_done: A lu (header) i holh thimnak ah kan in hruai cang — cucaah nangmah holh kha cuka ah thim.
cmd.set_ui_language_hint: A lu (header) i holh thimnak ah kal
cmd.set_ui_language_miss: Hmanhnak holh thimnak cu a cunglei menu bar ah a um.
cmd.open_allo_studio_hint: Mi zapi hman khawhmi poster, flyer le worksheet hna ser
cmd.open_cinematic_studio_hint: Cinematic thawhkanak le fianternak video hna ser
cmd.open_lingua_practice_hint: Atu source in biafang le holh cawn

cmd.open_open_groove_hint: Beat, synth pattern le hla ṭialnak a hngalmi music ser

cmd.open_test_prep_hub_hint: A man lomi cawnnak set le cawnnak hmanthlak hna hawng
cmd.open_timeline_studio_hint: Mi zapi hman khawhmi timeline hna sak le check
cmd.open_video_studio_hint: Lam hruainak video khumh, caption chap le remh
